'''âk-s-m''' ('''kakasam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calsomine|calsomine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-s-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calsomine|calsomine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-s-m
|-
! Lemma
| kakasam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikasam|thikasam]] || [[word:jikasam|jikasam]] || [[word:shikasam|shikasam]] || [[word:kikasam|kikasam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukasam|thuthukasam]] || [[word:jujukasam|jujukasam]] || [[word:shushukasam|shushukasam]] || [[word:kukukasam|kukukasam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukasam|thukasam]] || [[word:jukasam|jukasam]] || [[word:shukasam|shukasam]] || [[word:kukasam|kukasam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukasam|thukasam]] || [[word:jukasam|jukasam]] || [[word:shukasam|shukasam]] || [[word:kukasam|kukasam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekasam|thekasam]] || [[word:jekasam|jekasam]] || [[word:shekasam|shekasam]] || [[word:kekasam|kekasam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokasam|thothokasam]] || [[word:jojokasam|jojokasam]] || [[word:shoshokasam|shoshokasam]] || [[word:kokokasam|kokokasam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokasam|thokasam]] || [[word:jokasam|jokasam]] || [[word:shokasam|shokasam]] || [[word:kokasam|kokasam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokasam|thokasam]] || [[word:jokasam|jokasam]] || [[word:shokasam|shokasam]] || [[word:kokasam|kokasam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkasam|thĂŠkasam]] || [[word:jĂŠkasam|jĂŠkasam]] || [[word:shĂŠkasam|shĂŠkasam]] || [[word:kĂŠkasam|kĂŠkasam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakasam|thathakasam]] || [[word:jajakasam|jajakasam]] || [[word:shashakasam|shashakasam]] || [[word:kakakasam|kakakasam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakasam|thakasam]] || [[word:jakasam|jakasam]] || [[word:shakasam|shakasam]] || [[word:kakasam|kakasam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakasam|thakasam]] || [[word:jakasam|jakasam]] || [[word:shakasam|shakasam]] || [[word:kakasam|kakasam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakasam|shakasam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakasam|goshakasam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakasam|gokishakasam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakasamnĂŒ|shakasamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakasamnknĂŒ|goshakasamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakasamnĂŒ|gokishakasamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakasamshĂ«|shakasamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakasamnkshĂ«|goshakasamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakasamshĂ«|gokishakasamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakasamro|shakasamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakasamnkro|goshakasamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakasamro|gokishakasamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakasamu|shakasamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakasamnkmu|goshakasamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakasamu|gokishakasamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakasamsher|shakasamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakasamnksher|goshakasamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakasamsher|gokishakasamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakasamng|shakasamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakasamnkng|goshakasamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakasamng|gokishakasamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakasamya|shakasamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakasamnkya|goshakasamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakasamya|gokishakasamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakasamyam|shakasamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakasamnkyam|goshakasamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakasamyam|gokishakasamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakasamnĂŒshĂ«|shakasamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakasamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshakasamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakasamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishakasamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakasamnĂŒro|shakasamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakasamnknĂŒro|goshakasamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakasamnĂŒro|gokishakasamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakasamnĂŒmu|shakasamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakasamnknĂŒmu|goshakasamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakasamnĂŒmu|gokishakasamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakasamshĂ«nĂŒ|shakasamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakasamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakasamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakasamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakasamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakasamshĂ«ro|shakasamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakasamnkshĂ«ro|goshakasamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakasamshĂ«ro|gokishakasamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakasamshĂ«mu|shakasamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakasamnkshĂ«mu|goshakasamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakasamshĂ«mu|gokishakasamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakasamronĂŒ|shakasamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakasamnkronĂŒ|goshakasamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakasamronĂŒ|gokishakasamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakasamroshĂ«|shakasamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakasamnkroshĂ«|goshakasamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakasamroshĂ«|gokishakasamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakasamromu|shakasamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakasamnkromu|goshakasamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakasamromu|gokishakasamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakasamunĂŒ|shakasamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakasamnkmunĂŒ|goshakasamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakasamunĂŒ|gokishakasamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakasamushĂ«|shakasamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakasamnkmushĂ«|goshakasamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakasamushĂ«|gokishakasamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakasamuro|shakasamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakasamnkmuro|goshakasamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakasamuro|gokishakasamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
